title: Sample SOW lock
proof: SOW lists fake-data scope, exclusions, owners, source-code rule, and acceptance tests

title: Safety and data boundary clause
proof: Provider confirms no real records, member lists, cultural material, or voting data

title: Decidim app scaffold
proof: Repository, version pin, setup notes, and boot screenshot

title: Hosting and backup plan
proof: Host choice, backup schedule, restore path, environment notes, and admin access path

title: Organisation settings
proof: Languages, time zone, admin roles, appearance, and public terms configured with fake text

title: Spaces and components
proof: Assembly and process configured with proposals, meetings, survey, budgets, accountability, and page component

title: Fake content seed
proof: Fake seed register imported or manually configured with safety review sign-off

title: Acceptance test evidence
proof: Critical tests passed or blockers logged with owner and target date

title: Mobile and accessibility check
proof: Phone viewport, keyboard path, readable text, and contrast notes

title: Admin handover session
proof: Training agenda, attendee list, recording or notes, and admin checklist

title: Ops and support runbook
proof: Backup/delete drill, support contact, issue triage, and incident path

title: Pilot transition decision memo
proof: Decision states remain fake, improve, or begin separate real-pilot approvals
